passives.name: Blessing of the Mountain
passives.effects: Become ''Blessed'' to reduce incoming champion damage by {{rd|35%|25%}}, lingering for 2 seconds after taking damage from a champion. After the linger ends, you lose ''Blessed'' to unleash a shockwave around you that {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies within 500 units by 50% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds (18 second cooldown, timer restarts upon taking damage from champions).
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. Charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: Blessed: reduce incoming champion damage (35% melee / 25% ranged), lingering 2s after damage.
After Blessed ends, slow enemies within 500 units by 50% for 1.5s. Cooldown 18s, resets on champion damage.
Diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Place a Stealth Ward; charges refill at shop.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Celestial Opposition is modeled as a defensive support branch item: incoming-champion-damage mitigation with a delayed area slow response once Blessed ends.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior encodes page-verified pre/post-5-minute threshold formulas and reduction ranges, while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.
